title: Valor Mastery
summary: Valor mastery splits between a weapon-heavy vanguard and a relentless duelist. Practice opens the tiers, but your specialization commits you to either battlefield pressure or lethal finishing chains.

thresholds.title: Combat Awakening
thresholds.description: Claim either the vanguard's crushing line or the duelist's finishing rhythm.

thresholds.title: Battle Hardened
thresholds.description: Your chosen style sharpens into a recognisable combat doctrine.

thresholds.title: Veteran Edge
thresholds.description: A deeper commitment turns your branch into a real battlefield identity.

thresholds.title: Champion's Bearing
thresholds.description: Late mastery cements how you control the flow of a fight.

nodes.title: War Lexicon
nodes.description: This opening folio teaches that no strike is wasted when intent is named before steel is drawn.

nodes.title: Vanguard Iron Step
nodes.description: The manuscript says a heavy fighter must claim ground first, then let the axe speak second.

nodes.title: Duelist Opening Feint
nodes.description: Margin notes praise the swordsman who invites an overreach and answers with precise cruelty.

nodes.title: Linebreak Doctrine
nodes.description: The vanguard chapter describes breaking a shield wall by force of shoulder, haft, and will.

nodes.title: Pressure Chain
nodes.description: A duelist's script records the rhythm of advancing cuts that deny the enemy a breath.

nodes.title: Midfield Judgment
nodes.description: Between hammer and rapier, this leaf argues that choosing the moment is a warrior's true weapon.

nodes.title: Shock Column
nodes.description: Campaign annals praise the fighter who turns a formation into a moving siege ram.

nodes.title: Crater Blow
nodes.description: The outer vanguard path details overhead impacts that shatter confidence before armor.

nodes.title: Killing Lane
nodes.description: Duel records teach carving a narrow corridor where only your blade may enter first.

nodes.title: Last Breath Timing
nodes.description: This page names the breath before collapse as the surest instant for a finishing thrust.

nodes.title: Unbroken Banner
nodes.description: Only veterans read this hidden stanza, where endurance itself becomes an advancing weapon.

nodes.title: Finale Edict
nodes.description: This veiled coda promises a single flawless sequence that ends duels before doubt can return.
